goal: Write failing test shells from specs
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Skill file at skills/invariants-audit/SKILL.md (<=120 prose lines, stop conditions footer, sibling files linked via [See reference:] convention)
AC1a: Installer/sync coverage — init.sh and upgrade.sh install to .claude/skills/invariants-audit/ with byte-identity sync tests
AC2: Teaches 5 review categories (state-machine, blocked paths, spec contradictions, fixture mismatches, syntax-not-behavior tests)
AC3: 5-step invariant review method (identify, encoded, enforced, tested, failure paths)
AC4: Claude commands reference skill (review, architect, security-gate, test-design)
AC5: Codex reviewers contain ## Invariant Checks section with Apply when: trigger (review-code, review-prd, review-architecture, review-test-design)

AC6: Wiring contract tests verify: Claude commands have Skill References table row for invariants-audit; Codex reviewers have ## Invariant Checks section with Apply when: trigger; structural anchor tests for required section headings
AC7: Usage guidance with trigger conditions vs normal review
